steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that the tribal economic activity contributed over \$141,000 per employee on average.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B says the tribal figure is below transportation/warehousing but above both manufacturing and health care, which places it between those values and matches the over \$141,000 figure.
The other three either put it above all three, below all three, or nearly equal to transportation/warehousing, none of which align with being over \$141,000 while still lower than transportation/warehousing.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
